movie.actors: Ralph Macchio, Pat Morita, Robyn Lively, Thomas Ian Griffith
movie.plot: Ostracised villain John Kreese attempts to gain revenge on Daniel and Miyagi, with the help of a Vietnam War comrade, the wealthy owner of a toxic waste disposal business.
movie.title: The Karate Kid Part III
movie.writer: Robert Mark Kamen (characters), Robert Mark Kamen
